argv: node --input-type=module --eval "import { mkdir, writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises'; const files=JSON.parse(Buffer.from('','base64')); for (const [path, content] of Object.entries(files)) { await mkdir(path.includes('/') ? path.slice(0,path.lastIndexOf('/')) : '.', {recursive:true}); await writeFile(path,content); }"
label: bootstrap-publish
